testcase.name: test_hello_world

failure.message: ValueError: BASE_URL environment variable is not set.

testcase.failure:
self = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_hello_world>> argname = 'client'
def getfixturevalue(self, argname: str) -> Any: """Dynamically run a named fixture function.
Declaring fixtures via function argument is recommended where possible. But if you can only decide whether to use another fixture at test setup time, you may use this function to retrieve it inside a fixture or test function body.
This method can be used during the test setup phase or the test run phase, but during the test teardown phase a fixture's value may not be available.
:param argname: The fixture name. :raises pytest.FixtureLookupError: If the given fixture could not be found. """ # Note that in addition to the use case described in the docstring, # getfixturevalue() is also called by pytest itself during item and fixture # setup to evaluate the fixtures that are requested statically # (using function parameters, autouse, etc).
> fixturedef = self._get_active_fixturedef(argname) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

name = 'BASE_URL', t = <class 'str'>
def _fetch_env_variable[T](name: str, t: type[T]) -> T: value = os.getenv(name) if not value: > raise ValueError(f"{name} environment variable is not set.") E ValueError: BASE_URL environment variable is not set.

testcase.name: test_nonexistent_route

failure.message: ValueError: BASE_URL environment variable is not set.

testcase.failure:
self = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_nonexistent_route>> argname = 'client'
def getfixturevalue(self, argname: str) -> Any: """Dynamically run a named fixture function.
Declaring fixtures via function argument is recommended where possible. But if you can only decide whether to use another fixture at test setup time, you may use this function to retrieve it inside a fixture or test function body.
This method can be used during the test setup phase or the test run phase, but during the test teardown phase a fixture's value may not be available.
:param argname: The fixture name. :raises pytest.FixtureLookupError: If the given fixture could not be found. """ # Note that in addition to the use case described in the docstring, # getfixturevalue() is also called by pytest itself during item and fixture # setup to evaluate the fixtures that are requested statically # (using function parameters, autouse, etc).
> fixturedef = self._get_active_fixturedef(argname) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
/root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:549: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:640: in _get_active_fixturedef fixturedef.execute(request=subrequest) /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1084: in execute fixturedef = request._get_active_fixturedef(argname) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:640: in _get_active_fixturedef fixturedef.execute(request=subrequest) /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1108: in execute raise exc.with_traceback(exc_tb) /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1196: in pytest_fixture_setup result = call_fixture_func(fixturefunc, request, kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.pyenv/versions/3.14.0/envs/gateway/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:930: in call_fixture_func fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:56: in base_url return _fetch_env_variable("BASE_URL", str) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
name = 'BASE_URL', t = <class 'str'>
def _fetch_env_variable[T](name: str, t: type[T]) -> T: value = os.getenv(name) if not value: > raise ValueError(f"{name} environment variable is not set.") E ValueError: BASE_URL environment variable is not set.
